params.negative_prompt: no text, no words, no letters, no numbers, no digits, no labels, no logos, no UI, no stamps, no paperwork text, no cutaway diagram, no exploded view, no crowd, no gore, no stickers, no decals, no placards, no serial tags, no serial plates, no engraved plates, no warning signs, no warning plates, no stamped markings, no screen digits, no icon plates, no symbol plates, no interface readouts, no readable ui
params.accent_palette: warm concrete, brushed steel, muted brass, warning red
params.safe_zone_intent: keep the structural handoff readable above the subtitle band
params.signal_anchor: Hyatt structural accountability chain carried by atrium, load path, and connection detail
params.historical_anchor: The engineer approved it, the fabricator requested it, and the inspector signed off without one owner of the final check
params.surreal_breach: one impersonal structural handoff with no accountable owner while the Hyatt architecture stays canonical

directives: negative space occupies at least 60% of the frame
